summary: The initial vector kernel used TILE_NUM=16, which made each per-tile local buffer far too large for the 4096x4096 workload after diagonal expansion and triggered Ascend vector-core exception 507035/CCU instruction address check errors at runtime. Fix by increasing TILE_NUM to 2048 so tileLength drops to a safe size for UB allocation and DataCopy/Mul execution.
